'''Merglyn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]], she and [[Havor]] were [[Death/Legends|killed]] above [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] by the [[Kiffu Guardians]] while attempting to smuggle [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] to that [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
